app.tagline: The DeepSeek vibecoding client that's actually pleasant to use
dash.emptyHint: Run a task and stats plus savings records will show up here.
search.placeholder: Search conversations (title or content, across all projects)…
search.hint: ↑↓ select · Enter open · Esc close · Ctrl+K to open
sidebar.deleteConfirm: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.
usage.title: Usage & cost
settings.title: Settings
settings.keyHint: The key is stored on this machine with OS-level encryption only — never written in plain text or uploaded.
settings.baseUrlHint: Defaults to the official API; can point to third-party hosted endpoints.
settings.budgetHint: Leave empty = unlimited. Near the cap, later turns auto-downgrade to v4-flash with thinking off, and you get a notice.
settings.alertsHint: Sends a system notification when triggered (only while the app is in the background). Leave empty to disable.
skills.title: Project skills
skills.hint: Claude Code skills (SKILL.md) work unchanged; switches apply to new conversations.
skills.switchHint: Allow this project to use the skill (new conversations)
skills.empty: This project has no skills. Create .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md to add one.
skills.noSkillMd: The selected folder has no SKILL.md — not a valid skill
tools.imageSoon: DeepSeek has no image input yet — enabled once a vision model ships
tools.noSkills: No skills available for this project
tools.noMcp: No MCP servers connected (configure in Settings → Skills)
onboard.themePrompt: Pick an appearance to start with — you can change it anytime in Settings.
onboard.keyPrompt: Paste your DeepSeek API key to begin; you can also configure it later in Settings.
onboard.featRepoBody: Brings the whole project into the conversation so the model finds what to change without paging through files. In big projects, just describe the behavior to change.
onboard.featPermBody: Reading files is allowed outright; edits ask first; dangerous operations like deletes need a second confirmation.
onboard.featPlanBody: For complex tasks, it lays out a plan and waits for your OK before touching anything.
onboard.featReceiptBody: Every task ends with a cost breakdown — what it spent and what it saved, in plain view.
mcp.title: MCP servers
mcp.hint: Reads .mcp.json at the project root; switches and additions apply to new conversations.
mcp.empty: No MCP servers configured. Create .mcp.json at the project root.
mcp.addSecurity: MCP servers execute commands on your machine. Only add sources you trust; connects when the next new conversation starts.
settings.updatesIntro: The main changes in each version.
memory.title: Memory
memory.hint: Everything the agent remembers lives here; edit or delete freely. MEMORY.md is injected at the start of every new conversation.
memory.disabledHint: Memory is off: new conversations won't inject any project or global memory.
memory.enabledHint: Toggle whether new conversations inject memory (project + global)
memory.empty: No memory files in this project yet. Run a few tasks and the agent will distill project knowledge automatically.
memory.projectHint: This project's memory (.vibeseek/), distilled automatically from past tasks; checkpoints handle long-session compaction and restore.
memory.globalHint: Global personalization memory (~/.vibeseek/MEMORY.md), applied across every project and maintained by you — for stable preferences (code style, go-to commands).
memory.deleteConfirm: Delete this memory file? This cannot be undone.
settings.zoomHint: Ctrl + = to zoom in, Ctrl + − to zoom out, Ctrl + 0 to reset; remembered per window.
settings.diagnosticsHint: Attach a diagnostics bundle when reporting issues (keys are auto-redacted; no code content included).
settings.replayOnboardingHint: Replay the first-run guide (theme, API key, feature intro). Reloads the window.
settings.resetStatsHint: Clears all cumulative usage and savings stats (your balance and conversations are untouched). Cannot be undone.
settings.resetStatsConfirm: Clear all cumulative usage and savings stats? This cannot be undone (your balance and conversations are unaffected).
chat.placeholder: Describe a task. Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line, / for directives & skills
chat.waitingLong: (Responses are slower with long context or expired cache — the agent is not stuck)
chat.startHint: Describe a task and the agent will read files, edit code, and run commands to finish it.
chat.pickProjectHint: Pick a project folder first — the agent works inside it
home.existing: Folder already belongs to project "{{name}}" — the conversation will live there
ach.heroDiscount: Like paying just {{percent}}% of the list price
ach.heroNothing: Nothing recorded this month yet — run a task and bank your first savings.
ach.heatTitle: Last 17 weeks · one cell = that day's requests
ach.q1: Read through the project structure and tell me what it does and where the entry point is
ach.q2: Find the most bug-prone spots in the code and explain why
ach.q3: Write a set of unit tests for the core modules that lack them
ach.q4: Review the uncommitted changes and point out what could be simplified
dash.rankTitle: Conversations by cost (click to expand cost timeline)
proj.hint: Type a task below to start a new conversation in this project.
receipt.empty: No spending recorded yet — run a task, then come back for the receipt.
msg.fork: Fork a new conversation from here
msg.rewind: Rewind to here (delete what follows and restore files)
msg.rewindConfirm: This deletes this message and everything after it, and restores the workspace to the state before it was sent. The message text is put back into the input box so you can edit and resend. This cannot be undone.
msg.rewindConfirmNoGit: This deletes this message and everything after it. Note: this project has no version control, so file changes will NOT be restored (you can reject them one by one in the Changes panel). The message text is put back into the input box so you can edit and resend. This cannot be undone.
access.question: How should actions be approved?
access.askDesc: Asks before writing files or running mutating commands
access.fullDesc: Runs everything automatically; dangerous commands still ask
plan.hint: Read-only analysis that produces a plan without touching any files
plan.executeHint: Exit plan mode and let the agent carry out the plan above
plan.executeMsg: The plan looks good — go ahead and execute it as written.
repo.hint: Full-repo mode (a per-project default): while on, every new conversation you start in this project carries the whole project source, so the model never has to search. Each conversation locks the setting in when it starts, so you can only change it before a conversation begins.
repo.onExplain:
Full-repo mode is a default for this project: while it's on, every new conversation you start in this project automatically loads the entire project source into context, so the model never needs to grep or re-read files.

Cost: the first turn of each new conversation is billed as cache misses (a few cents for small projects); after that nearly every turn is a full cache hit and close to free.

How it applies: each conversation reads this setting when it starts and locks it in, so you can only change it before a conversation begins; changes affect only conversations created afterwards, not ones already underway.

Advice: if you keep working on this project and it isn't large, leave it on. If your next tasks are scattered one-offs, turn it off.
repo.badgeHint: This conversation has the entire project source loaded — the model never has to search, and nearly every turn hits the cache. Locked in when the conversation started; the switch doesn't change it.
picker.autoDesc: Each task is triaged by flash first: simple tasks stay on flash, complex ones get pro
picker.flashDesc: Fast and cheap — great for everyday edits
picker.proDesc: Stronger, for complex tasks (about 3× the price)
perm.title: Approval needed
plan.empty: When the agent works on a multi-step task, its plan and live progress show up here.
preview.detecting: Looking for a local dev server…
preview.noServer: No local dev server found. Start your project (e.g. pnpm dev), then hit ◎ to re-detect, or type an address above.
files.tooLarge: File too large to preview here (>512KB)
ov.noSession: Open a conversation to see live metrics here
changes.title: Changes
changes.none: No file changes in this task yet
changes.rollbackHint: Restores workspace files to the state before this task started (conversation stays; the agent is told files were rolled back). Reversible.
changes.redoHint: Undo the rollback and bring the file edits back
git.notRepo: This project has no version control yet. Once enabled, a restore point is saved automatically before the AI touches anything, so you can undo all changes with one click.
dev.title: Developer panel
dev.noDrift: No prefix drift detected this session
dev.noTurns: No requests in this session yet
status.savedFull: Amount saved by cache hits vs. miss pricing
